name: RD AUTO SALES LLC
description_short: Nashville used car dealership offering upfront pricing and in-house financing for all credit types, including buyers with poor or no credit history.
description_long:
RD Auto Sales LLC is a used car dealership operating out of Nashville, Tennessee, located at 2817 Dickerson Pike. The company operates under a straightforward, consumer-friendly model emphasizing transparent pricing and accessible vehicle financing. No founding year has been independently verified, and the business does not hold financial-sector certifications such as CDFI, HUD approval, or NFCC membership — nor would those apply to a vehicle retail operation. It is one of at least two distinct businesses operating under the RD Auto Sales LLC name, with a separate location in Greenwood, Arkansas.

The Nashville location sells pre-owned cars, trucks, and SUVs and offers in-house or assisted financing, explicitly serving buyers across the credit spectrum — including those with damaged or limited credit histories. The dealership promotes an upfront, lowest-price model consistent with no-haggle retail practices, meaning advertised prices are intended to reflect final transaction prices without extended negotiation. Vehicle inventory is browsable online via their website at rdautosalestn.com. No loan amounts, interest rates, or specific financing terms were disclosed publicly on the site.

RD Auto Sales Nashville has earned a perfect 5.0-star rating on Google from 61 reviews, suggesting consistently positive customer experiences. iSeeCars, an automotive data platform, also rates the Nashville location at 5.0 stars based on 34 vehicle listings, which may reflect competitive pricing relative to market value. The combination of top ratings across multiple independent platforms is a notable differentiator for an independent used car lot in a competitive metro market.

For consumers with bruised credit who need reliable transportation, RD Auto Sales Nashville offers a practical, accessible option — in-house financing can provide an opportunity to establish a positive auto loan payment history. However, prospective buyers should be aware that in-house dealer financing frequently carries higher interest rates than traditional bank or credit union auto loans, and no specific APR ranges or loan terms are published. There is no verified money-back guarantee, no mobile app, and BBB accreditation status could not be confirmed. Buyers should compare financing terms carefully before committing.
pros: Perfect 5.0-star Google rating from 61 customer reviews
iSeeCars 5.0-star rating based on 34 vehicle listings, suggesting competitively priced inventory
In-house financing available for all credit types, including poor or no credit
Upfront/no-haggle pricing model reduces negotiation friction for buyers
Online inventory browsing available at rdautosalestn.com
Located in Nashville at 2817 Dickerson Pike — accessible urban location on a major corridor
cons: No financing terms (APR, loan duration, down payment requirements) published publicly
In-house dealer financing typically carries higher interest rates than bank or credit union auto loans
No verified BBB listing or accreditation found
No money-back guarantee or return policy confirmed
No mobile app — inventory and account management limited to website
best_for: Consumers with poor or damaged credit who need a vehicle and cannot qualify for traditional auto financing
First-time buyers with no credit history seeking in-house financing to begin building a credit record
Nashville-area buyers who prefer no-haggle, upfront pricing on used vehicles
Shoppers looking for affordable pre-owned cars, trucks, or SUVs in the Nashville metro area
diagnosis: RD Auto Sales Nashville is best suited for credit-challenged consumers who need transportation and are willing to accept dealer-arranged financing as a credit-building stepping stone. The standout ratings across Google and iSeeCars suggest real customer satisfaction, but buyers should independently verify financing terms and compare APRs before signing — in-house dealer financing for subprime borrowers often comes at a significant cost premium.
services: Assisted financing for all credit types
